Apple.latest_product: M4 iPad Air, MacBook Neo (Released Mar 2026), iPhone 17e (Pre-order), M5 MacBook Pro (Rumored)
Apple.news: Apple week of announcements (Mar 4) included iPhone 17e, new iPad, and MacBook Neo. Rumors of M5 MacBook Pro and budget MacBook under $1,000.

NVIDIA.news: GTC 2026 kicks off Mar 16. Warning that Chinese rivals are disrupting the market with domestic AI chips.

Huawei.latest_product: AI Computing Clusters, Mate 70 series, Mate X6, HarmonyOS NEXT, Smart Glasses
Huawei.news: Launched AI-powered smart glasses. Global debut for AI computing clusters on Mar 2. Spring Launch predicted Mar 20.

Alibaba.latest_product: New AI Models (Qwen Series), AI Smart Glasses
Alibaba.news: Launched AI-powered smart glasses. Open-sourcing robust AI technology to compete globally.

ByteDance.news: Major AI model releases and increased competition in the Chinese market.

Honor.latest_product: Magic V6 Foldable (Mar 10), MagicPad 3 Pro (Dual OS), MagicPad 4 (Overseas)
Honor.news: CEO confirms 85M sales goal. Launched 'Dragonfly' AI Agent matrix. Tablet PC-ification plan announced.

Xiaomi.news: Xiaomi 17 Series launched at MWC 2026. Also entered the AI smart glasses market alongside Alibaba and Huawei.

NIO.news: Achieved first quarterly profit (Q4 2025). 5nm Shenji chip in mass production.

OpenAI.news: Directly competing with Anthropic. Acquired developer of OpenClaw (Peter Steinberger).

Meta.news: Acquired AI agent social network Moltbook; founders joining Meta Superintelligence Lab.

Nintendo.news: Yoshi game confirmed as Switch 2 title for May 2026.
